keys.restored: Key backup restored ✓ Keys installed locally
keys.noBackup: No encrypted backup exists for this account
keys.missingPublicKey: Backup is missing a public key

keySetup.title: Lungisa amakhiwo edivayisi yakho
keySetup.description: Le divayisi ayikabi nendima yakho yangasese okwamanje. Genisa i-backup evikelwe ngephasiwedi, noma udale ipheya yamakhi entsha (uzokwazi ukufunda imilayezo emisha kusukela manje).
keySetup.imported: Ikhiye yangasese ifakiwe kulesi sixhobo. Ungafunda imilayezo yakudala manje.
keySetup.enterPassword: Faka iphasiwedi ye-akhawunti yakho ukuze sikwazi ukugcina amakhiye akho ngokuphepha.

encryptionRecovery.title: Lawula Ukufihla
encryptionRecovery.description: Gcina, buyisela, vula, noma usethe kabusha ikhiye lakho lokufihla.

alert.keyRequiredBody: Leli bhrawuza alikwazi okwamanje ukuvula imilayezo yakho efihliwe. Buyisela, vula, noma usethe kabusha ukhiye wakho ukuze uqhubeke.
alert.lockedBody: Buyisela noma uvule ikhiye lakho lokufihla ukuze ufunde imilayezo efihliwe kulesi sixhobo.

unlockPasscode.label: Vula ikhodi yokudlula (idivayisi yamanje)
unlockPasscode.description: Isetshenziselwa ukuvula amagugu akho wendawo ngaphambi kokuwathumela ngaphandle

restoreBackupPassword.label: Iphasiwedi yokubackup
restoreBackupPassword.description: Iphasiwedi oyidalile ngesikhathi ugcina ukhiye wakho ku-iPhone

resetLocalPasscode.label: Ikhodi yendawo entsha
resetLocalPasscode.description: Idingeka ngaphambi kokusetha kabusha ukuze isihluthulelo esisha sivikelwe kulesi sixhobo

devicePasscode.label: Iphasiwedi yedivayisi
devicePasscode.description: Faka iphasiwedi esetshenziselwa ukuvikela izihluthulelo kule divayisi.

newDevicePasscode.label: New device passcode
newDevicePasscode.description: Dala ikhodi yokuvikela amakhiye kule divayisi.

resetDevicePasscode.label: Ikhodi yedivayisi entsha
resetDevicePasscode.description: Dala ikhodi yekhiye entsha yokufihla kule divayisi.

messages.keyRestored: Ikhiye libuyiselwe kusuka kukhophi yokugcina ye-akhawunti.

errors.restoreIncomplete: Ukubuyiselwa kwekhiye akuphelele noma akulungile kule akhawunti
errors.noBackup: Ayikho i-backup evikelwe ngokufihla yaleli akhawunti
errors.noServerPublicKey: Leli akhawunti okwamanje alivezanga i-server public key
errors.serverBackupMismatch: I-backup yeseva ayihambisani ne-encryption key yamanje yaleli akhawunti
errors.resetFailed: Akwenzeki ukubuyisela ukufihla-magama. Sicela uzame futhi.
errors.restoreFailed: Akwenzeki ukubuyisela ukhiye wakho wokufihla. Hlola isipele sakho nephasiwedi yakho.
errors.unlockFailed: Akwenzeki ukuvula ukhiye wakho wokufihla. Hlola ikhodi yakho yokuphasa bese uzama futhi.

confirm.reset:
Usetha kabusha ukufihla kwale akhawunti?

Imilayezo endala efihliwe ingase ingafundeki ngaphandle kokuthi ubuyisele ukhiye wokuqala kamuva.

encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: Lokhu kukhiqiza ukhiye omusha wokufihla imilayezo ku-akhawunti yakho. Imilayezo endala efihliwe ingase ingasafundeki ngaphandle kokuthi ubuyisele ukhiye wokuqala kamuva.

danger.title: Qala ukufihla imilayezo entsha
danger.body: Lokhu kudala ukhiye omusha wokufihla imilayezo. Imilayezo endala efihliwe ingase ingasafundeki ngaphandle kokuthi ubuyisele ukhiye wokuqala kamuva.

encryptionRecovery.simpleDescription: Sebenzisa ikhodi yakho yedivayisi noma ubuyisele i-backup ukuze uvule imilayezo efihliwe.
encryptionRecovery.restoreDescription: Buyisela ukhiye wakho wengxoxo efihliwe kusuka ku-backup evikelwe ngephasiwedi yakho ye-backup.

smsConsent.label: Ngivuma ukuthola izaziso ze-SMS nezokuxwayisa ezivela ku-{{companyName}}. Ukuvama kwemilayezo kungahluka. Izindleko zemilayezo nedatha zingase zisebenze. Phendula <stop>STOP</stop> ukuze ukhansele noma kunini. Phendula <help>HELP</help> ukuze uthole usizo.

auth.headline: Ukuthumela imilayezo okuphephile kunoma ubani, noma kuphi
auth.description: Ukubethela kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni, ukuhumusha ezilimini ezingaphezu kuka-100, imilayezo ephunyayo, kanye nokubiza ngomsindo/ividiyo.

feature.encryption: Ukubethela kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni ngokungagcini
feature.privacy: Ubumfihlo kuqala. Idatha yakho, ukulawula kwakho.

hero.line1: Ukuthumela imilayezo ephephile kunoma ubani, noma kuphi — nge
hero.sub: Thola inombolo yocingo evikelekile yamahhala ongayisebenzisa ukushayela nokuthumela imiyalezo emhlabeni wonke nge-Wi-Fi noma ngedatha. Jabulela ukuvikelwa kwedatha kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni, imiyalezo ephambayo, nokushayela kwezwi/ividiyo kwe-HD — ngezinsiza ezakhelwe ngaphakathi ezikusiza ukuthi uhlale uxhumekile ngaphesheya kwemingcele.
hero.freeNote: Ukushayela nokuthumela imiyalezo okuyisisekelo kumahhala. I-AI ethuthukile nezici eziphakeme zidinga ukuba uyezibuyekeze.

feat.encryption: Ukuvikelwa kwedatha kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni, kuhlala kusebenza
feat.privacy: Ubumfihlo kuqala. Idatha yakho, ukulawula kwakho.

auth.desktopTip: On desktop? Scan with your phone to get the app.
auth.scanHelper: On desktop? Scan with your phone to get the app.
auth.subhead: Ukuthumela imilayezo eyimfihlo, efihliwe, futhi ehumushiwe — ngokushesha.
auth.tip: Ithiphu: Sebenzisa i-akhawunti efanayo kuwebhu nakuselula. Imilayezo yakho ihlala ivumelanisiwe.
auth.scanHint: Skenisha ukuze ulande uhlelo lokusebenza noma uvule kusiphequluli sakho.

registration.passwordDescription: Okungenani izinhlamvu ezi-6. Sebenzisa iphasiwedi eqinile, eyingqayizivele.
registration.smsConsent: Ngokudala i-akhawunti, uyavuma ukuthola izaziso ze-SMS ezihlobene nemisebenzi yakho ye-Chatforia (njengemilayezo evela kwabanye abasebenzisi). Izindleko zemilayezo nedatha zingase zisebenze. Ungakhetha ukungatholi izaziso nganoma yisiphi isikhathi ku-Izilungiselelo.
registration.phoneHelp: Isetshenziselwa ukuqinisekisa, ukuphepha, nezici ze-SMS lapho zisekelwa khona.
registration.title: Dala i-akhawunti yakho ye-Chatforia

auth.enterValidRecipient: Faka igama lomuntu oqoshwe noma inombolo yocingo.

errors.invalidInput: Sicela uhlole imininingwane yakho bese uzama futhi.
errors.passwordLength: Iphasiwedi kumele ibe nezinhlamvu eziyisithupha okungenani.
errors.smsConsent: Sicela wamukele imvume ye-SMS ukuze uqhubeke.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Kuzame kakhulu. Sicela ulinde bese uzama futhi.
errors.usernameOrEmailTaken: Igama lomsebenzisi noma ikheli le-imeyili selithathwe.

login.title: Qhubeka uye eChatforia
login.ssoUnavailable: Ukufaka okukodwa okwamanje akwenzeki. Sebenzisa igama lomsebenzisi nephasiwedi esikhundleni salokho.

verification.sent: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.

error.unprocessable: Isicelo esingalungile. Hlola igama lomsebenzisi/i-imeyili yakho nephasiwedi.
error.deviceLimit: Umkhawulo wedivayisi usufinyelelwe ku-Free plan. Phuma kwenye idivayisi noma uthuthukise uye ku-Premium ukuze uxhumanise amadivayisi amaningi.

forgotPassword.title: Ukkhohlwe i-password
forgotPassword.helper: Faka i-imeyili oyisebenzisile ukudala i-akhawunti yakho ye-Chatforia futhi sizokuthumelela isixhumanisi esiphephile sokubuyekeza i-password yakho.
forgotPassword.genericError: Akwenzeki ukucubungula isicelo. Sicela uzame futhi ngemva komzuzwana.
forgotPassword.sentHelper: Uma kune-akhawunti ekhona nale imeyili, sesithumele isixhumanisi sokusetha kabusha iphasiwedi. Kungathatha imizuzu embalwa ukufika. Qiniseka ukuthi ubheka ifolda yakho ye-spam noma yezokuphromotha.

resetPassword.title: Sethala Phansi iPhasiwedi
resetPassword.missingToken: Ithokheni yokusetha kabusha iphasiwedi ayilungile noma ayikho.
resetPassword.missingTokenHelper: Ithokheni ayilungile noma ayikho. Sicela ucele isixhumanisi esisha sokubuyisela iphasiwedi.
resetPassword.strongPasswordHint: Khetha iphasiwedi eqinile ongayisebenzisi kwenye indawo.

home.title: Ikhaya
home.messagesSubtitle: Faka umamukeli ngenhla, bese uthumela umlayezo ukuze uqale ingxoxo.
home.mixedRecipients: Kutholakale abamukeli abaxubekile. Sebenzisa wonke amanombolo wefoni (SMS) noma wonke amagama abasebenzisi (Chatforia).
home.needNumber: Udinga inombolo ye-Chatforia ngaphambi kokuthumela i-SMS.
home.enterValidRecipient: Faka igama lomuntu oslayidiwe, igama lomsebenzisi, noma inombolo yocingo.

composer.sendDisabled: Type a message or attach a file to send.

sidebar.loginPrompt: Log in to edit your settings.

chat.selectPrompt: Khetha umbhalo noma igumbi lokuxoxa ukuze uqale ukuxoxa
chat.blockConfirm: Vimba u-{{name}}? Awusoze wamukele imilayezo evela kubo.
chat.unlockToView: Vula isihluthulelo sakho ukuze ubone lo myalezo
chat.clearConfirm: Ucime ingxoxo? Lokhu ngeke kubuyiselwe emuva.

messageInput.freeLimit: Umkhawulo wohlelo lwamahhala: ukusula ngokuzenzakalelayo kuze kube usuku olulodwa. Kuboshwe ku-1d.
messageInput.premiumLimit: Isikhathi eside kakhulu sokuzicima se-Premium singezinsuku ezingama-30. Siboshwe ezinsukwini ezingama-30.
messageInput.nothingToSend: Bhala umlayezo noma uxhumanise ifayela ongathumela.
messageInput.caption: Caption (optional)

errors.attachmentTooLarge: Ifayela elinamathiselwe likhulu kakhulu. Zama ifayela elincane.
errors.rateLimit: Uthumela imilayezo ngokushesha kakhulu. Sicela wehlise ijubane.
errors.validation: Kube nempazamo yokuqinisekisa. Sicela uhlole umlayezo wakho bese uzama futhi.
errors.failedToSend: Kwehlulekile ukuthumela. Ungazama futhi ibhubhu elihlulekile.
errors.upgradeRequired: Kudingeka ukuvuselelwa ukuze usebenzise lesi sici.

messages.addCaptionThenSend: Add a caption, then tap Send
messages.noOneHasReadThisMessageYet: No one has read this message yet.

status.filesNote: Up to 5 files. 24h expiry by default.

contactList.notJoined: That contact hasn’t joined Chatforia yet.
contactList.couldNotStart: Could not start chat. Please try again.
contactList.startFailed: Failed to start chat. Please try again.
contactList.deleteFailed: Failed to delete contact. Please try again.
contactList.updateAliasFailed: Failed to update alias. Please try again.
contactList.loadFailed: Failed to load contacts. Please try again.
contactList.callStarted: Calling this number via your Chatforia number…
contactList.callFailed: Failed to start call. Please try again.
contactList.noRoute: No route available for this contact.
contactList.videoRequiresAccount: Video calls require a Chatforia account.

addContactModal.title: Engeza oxhumana naye
addContactModal.enterPhoneOrUsername: Faka inombolo yocingo noma igama lomsebenzisi.
addContactModal.cannotAddSelf: Awukwazi ukwengeza wena uqobo njengoxhumana naye.

startChatModal.title: Qala ingxoxo
startChatModal.searchPlaceholder: Sesha igama, igama lomsebenzisi, noma inombolo yocingo
startChatModal.noContactsMatch: Akekho oxhumana naye ohambisana nokusesha kwakho.
startChatModal.nameUsernamePhoneEmail: Bhala igama, i-username, inombolo yocingo, noma i-imeyili…
startChatModal.searchByUsernameOrPhone: Sesha ngegama lomsebenzisi noma ngenombolo yocingo
startChatModal.searchPrompt: Bhala igama lomsebenzisi noma inombolo yocingo bese ucindezela Sesha.
startChatModal.saveContactsHint: Okufakiwe kwefoni/i-imeyili kuzotholakala ngemva kokuwagcina njengoxhumana naye.

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: Search saved contacts by alias, name, username, or phone
peoplePage.quickStartDesc: Manage your contacts and invite friends.
peoplePage.inviteDesc: Share your invite link to start chatting instantly.
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Stay in touch on the go with Chatforia for iOS and Android.
peoplePage.syncTip: Tip: Your messages stay synced across web and mobile.

profile.title: Iphrofayela yomsebenzisi
profile.noPrivateKey: Ayikho ukhiye wangasese kulesi sixhobo ongawuthumela ngaphandle.
profile.setBackupPassword: Beka iphasiwedi ukuze uvikele ukugcinwa kwakho:
profile.importFailed: Kwehlulekile ukungenisa ukhiye (iphasiwedi engalungile noma ifayela elonakele).
profile.keysRotated: Kudalwe ipheya elisha lezihluthulelo futhi isihluthulelo somphakathi silayishiwe.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Ikhiye lakho langasese alikaze liphume kulesi sixhobo. Thumela ngaphandle ikhophi evikelwe ngephasiwedi ukuze ubuyisele kuyo kwenye idivayisi.
profile.themeFreeNotice: Use kusengaphambili—sebenzisa izinketho ezisheshayo zeLanga/Nyanga ngezansi. Khuphula ukuze uvule izindikimba eziningi.
profile.backupDesc: Gcina ikhiye lakho lokufihla ukuze ubuyisele imilayezo yakho ngokuphepha kwelinye idivayisi.
profile.freePlanCopy: Usehlelweni lwamahhala. Khuphula ukuze uvule izici ezengeziwe ezifana nezipele, izinombolo ezengeziwe, nezinketho zobumfihlo ezithuthukisiwe.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Akwenzeki ukuvula i-portal yokukhokhisa. Sicela uzame futhi.
profile.followHint: Izindaba zabo zizovela ku-feed yakho yokulandela uma zithunyelwe kubalandeli (noma Esidlangalaleni).
profile.sectionCrashedBody: Kukhona okuthile okungahambi kahle kulesi sigaba.
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Dlulisa izingcingo nemilayezo engenayo kuhlelo lwakho lwefoni oluqinisekisiwe noma ku-imeyili yakho. Izicingo/imilayezo ephumayo ingakhombisa inombolo yakho ye-Chatforia.
profile.errSmsDest: Khetha okungenani indawo eyodwa (ifoni noma i-imeyili).
profile.errQuietHours: Amahora athule kumele abe phakathi kuka-0 no-23.
profile.ageBandHint: Sigcina kuphela ibanga lobudala (hhayi usuku lwakho lokuzalwa oluqondile) . Lokhu kusetshenziselwa ukugcina ukuphathwa kwamaqembu e-Random Chat kufanelekile.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Sebenzisa ukufanisa okusekelwe eminyakeni ku-Random Chat
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Uma kuvuliwe, sizama ukukufanisa nabantu abakumaqembu eminyakeni afanele.
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Abasha bahlala behlanganyiswa kuphela nabanye abasha. Abantu abadala abakwazi ukuhlanganyiswa nabasha.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Ngenxa yokuphepha, ama-akhawunti aneminyaka engu-13 kuya kwengu-17 angahlanganyiswa kuphela namanye ama-akhawunti angu-13 kuya kwengu-17 ku-Random Chat.
profile.foriaRemember: Vumela uRia akhumbule izinto ozimtshela zona
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Uma lokhu kuvuliwe, uForia angasebenzisa izingxoxo zakho zangaphambilini ze-Random Chat (nguwe kuphela) ukuze ingxoxo iqhubeke. Ungakwazi ukuyivala noma yinini.
profile.voicemailAutoDeleteDays: Susa ngokuzenzakalelayo imilayezo yezwi ngemva kwezinsuku (days)
profile.voicemailGreetingText: Umbhalo wokubingelela uma umsindo wakho ungatholakali
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Kusetshenziswa uma umsindo wakho wokubingelela ungatholakali.
profile.voicemailNote: Imi-voicemail evela kumanombolo akho e-Chatforia izogcinwa ebhokisini lakho lokungenayo le-Voicemail. Ungavumela ukuguqulwa kombhalo nokudluliselwa ezinhlelweni ezisekelwayo.
profile.portHint: Ufuna ukugcina inombolo yakho yamanje? Ungayidlulisela ku-Chatforia Wireless.

esim.title: Iphrofayela yomsebenzisi
esim.desc: Thola idatha yeselula ye-Chatforia uma ukude ne-Wi-Fi.
esim.descActive: I-eSIM yakho isebenza futhi isilungele ukuphathwa.

sounds.freeNoticeStart: You’re on Free — premium tones are shown but locked.
sounds.freeNotice: You’re on Free — premium tones are shown but locked. Upgrade to unlock all.

aiSettings.title: Izilungiselelo ze-AI
aiSettings.controlIntro: Lawula ukuhumusha, izimpendulo ezihlakaniphile, kanye nezimpendulo ezizenzakalelayo ze-ForiaBot.
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Send the last few received messages (sanitized) to AI to suggest quick replies.
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: If on, suggestions returned by AI will have flagged words masked
aiSettings.modeMention: Ngesikhathi kuphela lapho ngi ngi @kukhulunywe ngami

accessibilitySettings.title: Accessibility & Alerts
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Options to make Chatforia easier to use without relying on sound.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Starts at normal size. Increase if you prefer larger text.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Show banners and title blink so you don’t miss activity.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Brief bright flash when a call rings.
accessibilitySettings.liveCaptionsDesc: Show real-time captions from the other participant’s audio.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Attach a transcript to audio messages you receive.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Visual alerts for messages & calls
Show banners and title blink so you don’t miss activity.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Vibrate on new messages (when supported)
Trigger device vibration with notifications.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Flash screen on incoming call
Brief bright flash when a call rings.

privacySection.strictE2EE: Ukubethela okuqinile kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni
privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Gcina umbhalo ocashifreyidi kuphela kuseva. Kuvala i-AI/Translate kanye nokubuka kwangaphambilini kokulawula.
privacySection.strictE2EEDisabled: I-Strict E2EE ivaliwe. I-AI/Translate isivele yavulwa kabusha.

wireless.title: Chatforia Wireless
wireless.description: Lawula uhlelo lwakho lwe-Chatforia lweselula, izinombolo, ukudlulisela, nokudlulisa inombolo.

options.heading: Khetha ukuthi ufuna ukusebenzisa kanjani i-Chatforia
options.subheading: Ungathola inombolo entsha ye-Chatforia, noma ulethe inombolo yakho ekhona evela komunye umhlinzeki.
options.newNumber: Thola inombolo entsha ye-Chat foria number
options.portNumber: Port your current number into Chatforia Wireless

port.heading: Port your existing number
port.subheading: Dlulisa inombolo yakho yocingo ekhona kusuka kumhlinzeki wakho wamanje uye ku-Chatforia. Qiniseka ukuthi imininingwane iyahambisana ne-akhawunti yakho yomhlinzeki ngokunembile ukuze ugweme ukubambezeleka.

status.heading: Isimo sokudlulisa inombolo
status.subheading: Track the status of your number port requests.

wireless.exhausted: Your data has run out. Buy a new pack to continue using mobile data.
wireless.dashboardIntro: Lawula idatha yakho yeselula ye-Chatforia, inombolo yocingo, ukusetha kwe-eSIM, nesimo sohlelo.

data.caption: Landela ukusetshenziswa kwakho kwedatha okwamanje kanye nebhalansi esele.
data.familyCaption: Idatha ehlangene phakathi kwamalungu omndeni wakho.

plan.title: Uhlelo
plan.noneBody: Khetha iphakethe ledatha ukuze uqalise i-Chatforia Mobile.
plan.noneBodyReady: Qala usethe i-eSIM yakho kuqala, bese ukhetha iphakethe ledatha uma usukulungele.
plan.familyBody: Lolu hlelo luyingxenye yeqoqo ledatha yomndeni elabelwe.

esim.title: eSIM
esim.heading: Set up your eSIM
esim.subheading: Faka i-eSIM yakho ukuze usebenzise idatha ye-Chatforia Mobile kulesi sixhobo.
esim.body: Dala noma uvule ikhodi yakho ye-QR ye-eSIM bese ulandela imiyalelo yokuvula efoni yakho.
esim.readyBody: I-eSIM yakho isilungile. Ungavula ikhodi ye-QR noma uqhubeke nokuphatha uhlelo lwakho lwedatha yeselula.

esim.title: Chatforia eSIM
esim.errorReserve: Akwenzeki ukubhuka i-eSIM. Sicela uzame futhi.
esim.iccidHint: I-ICCID ihlela lo mprofayela we-eSIM ngokuphelele.
esim.secrecyNote: Gcina le khodi ye-QR iyimfihlo. Noma ubani onokufinyelela angase akwazi ukufaka i-eSIM.

instructions.step1: Vula izilungiselelo zedatha yeselula noma yedatha ephathekayo zocingo lwakho.
instructions.step3: Skenisha le khodi ye-QR bese ulandela izinyathelo ezikwisikrini ukuze uqedele ukusebenza.

phoneNumberManager.freeNumberHint: Inombolo yamahhala engase iphinde isetshenziswe uma ingasebenzi.
phoneNumberManager.premiumNumberHint: Gcina inombolo yakho ngenkathi isibhalelo sakho se-Premium sisebenza.
phoneNumberManager.lockThisNumber: Valela leli nombolo (isengezo seviki, sizofika maduzane)
phoneNumberManager.premiumProtectedHint: Amanombolo e-Premium avikelwe ekuphindweni kabusha ngenkathi isibhalelo sakho se-Premium sisebenza.
phoneNumberManager.searchHint: Faka ikhodi yendawo enezinombolo ezi-3 (e-US/CA kuphela), noma ushiye kungagcwaliswanga, bese usesha.
phoneNumberManager.couldNotAssign: Bekungekho okwenzeka ukunikeza leyo nombolo. Kungenzeka isanda kuthathwa—zama enye.
phoneNumberManager.couldNotLease: Bekungekho okwenzeka ukuqasha leyo nombolo. Kungenzeka isanda kuthathwa—zama enye.
phoneNumberManager.invalidAreaCode: Sicela ufake ikhodi yendawo enezinombolo ezi-3 (isb., 415) noma ushiye kungagcwaliswanga.
phoneNumberManager.noInventoryAreaCode: Ayikho isitoko esitholakalayo salo kodi yesifunda okwamanje.
phoneNumberManager.noFreeNumbersAreaCode: Azikho izinombolo ezikhululekile esizeni sethu salo kodi yesifunda okwamanje.
phoneNumberManager.releaseConfirm: Ukhiphe inombolo yakho yamanje? Ingase inikezwe omunye umuntu.
phoneNumberManager.releaseWarning: Your number may be released in {{count}} day. Upgrade to Premium to keep it protected.
phoneNumberManager.pickNumberHint: Pick a Chatforia number to use for messaging and communication inside the app.
phoneNumberManager.unableToLoadStatus: Unable to load phone number status.
phoneNumberManager.noNumberAssigned: Akukho inombolo enikeziwe. Khetha eyodwa ngokhodi yendawo ukuze uqale ukuthumela imiyalezo.

dialer.title: Izishayelo
dialer.subtitle: I-Keypad nezakamuva. (Uma ungayisebenzisi i-PSTN, qala izingcingo kusukela kusihloko sengxoxo.)
dialer.callRequiredNumber: Udinga inombolo ye-Chatforia ngaphambi kokwenza izingcingo zocingo.

direct.title: Ividiyo Eqondile
direct.subtitle: Qala ucingo lwevidiyo lwe-1:1 nomunye umsebenzisi.
direct.tipInvite: Ithiphu: Namathisela inombolo bese ushaya ucingo ngaphandle kokugcina ikontakthi. Sizomema abangakabi -abasebenzisi ngesixhumanisi.

rooms.title: Rooms
rooms.subtitle: Create a room or join an existing one by typing the same name.
rooms.desc: Multi-party video using a shared room name.
rooms.tip: Ithiphu: yabelana ngaleli gama nabanye, noma usebenzise isixhumanisi esijulile ku-

video.title: Ividiyo
video.roomsDesc: Ividiyo yabantu abaningi esebenzisa igama legumbi elabelwe bonke.

upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Add global eSIM data so Chatforia keeps working even when you’re away from Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Create a shared data pool for your family and manage everyone’s usage from one place.

mobile.title: Chatforia Mobile (eSIM data packs)
mobile.subtitle: Add global data to keep Chatforia working even without Wi-Fi. Prices automatically adjust based on your country and currency.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Pick a one-time global data pack so Chatforia keeps working when you’re traveling or away from Wi-Fi.

features.throttle: High-speed data subject to fair-use and network management policies

unlimited.title: Unlimited pack
unlimited.bestFor: Best for heavy use where supported.

disclaimer.devices: eSIM data packs require an eSIM-compatible and unlocked device. Availability varies by phone model, carrier, and country. Coverage and speeds vary by region.
disclaimer.fairUse: High-speed data may be subject to fair-use limits, local network conditions, and regional availability.

compare.title: Compare eSIM data packs
compare.disclaimer: Actual data usage depends on how you use Chatforia (voice, video, media, and other apps on your phone).

hero.subcopy: Instant eSIM data for travel, backup connectivity, and staying reachable away from Wi‑Fi.

mobile.choosePackSubtitle: Pick the coverage zone and amount of data that fits your trip or everyday backup needs.

feature.2: One-time data packs with clear pricing
feature.3: Use Chatforia when Wi‑Fi is unavailable

region.localSubtitle: Best for staying connected in one country.
region.europeSubtitle: Great for trips across supported European countries.
region.globalSubtitle: Best for international travel across multiple regions.

small.title: Small pack
small.bestFor: Best for short trips and light messaging.

medium.title: Medium pack
medium.bestFor: Best for everyday messaging, maps, and light media.

large.title: Large pack
large.bestFor: Best for longer trips and heavier app use.

xl.title: XL pack
xl.bestFor: Best for extended travel and frequent video or media use.

family.title: Chatforia Family (shared data)
family.subtitle: Share a single data pool across your family. One bill, multiple Chatforia accounts, global coverage.

small.title: Family Small
small.desc: Includes 20 GB of shared high-speed data — great for 2–3 light users.

medium.title: Family Medium
medium.desc: Includes 40 GB of shared high-speed data — ideal for 3–5 active members.

large.title: Family Large
large.desc: Includes 80 GB of shared high-speed data — for power families that are always online.

feature.shared: Shared data pool for your family
feature.fairUse: Subject to fair-use policy and local limits

family.disclaimer: Family packs create or top up a shared data pool. You can invite and remove members anytime.
family.footnote: Family packs share a single data pool across linked Chatforia accounts. Availability and limits depend on your country and local regulations.

why.title: Why people switch to Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia gives you a real phone number, smart translation, and a clear path to go ad-free when you’re ready.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Lighter ads on Free, a simple Plus upgrade when you’re ready, and Premium tools TextNow doesn’t offer.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Modern app, global-first design, and built-in translation instead of old-school call forwarding.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs chat apps
messengers.body: Text real phone numbers — not just other app users — with AI and status built in. Great if you’re coming from apps like TextFree or TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Comparison based on publicly available information and may change over time. Other free-texting apps like TextFree or TextMe are generally similar to TextNow.

free.q: Is the Free plan really free?
free.a: Yes. The Free plan includes a Chatforia number, calling, and messaging with ads. You can stay on Free as long as you like, or upgrade to remove ads and unlock more features.

plusPremium.q: What’s the difference between Plus and Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus removes ads and extends your message history — perfect for everyday use. Premium adds extra customization, AI tools for rewrites and replies, and priority support for heavy users.

esim.q: Where do eSIM data packs work?
esim.a: Chatforia Mobile uses global eSIM coverage. Availability depends on your country and device. You’ll see supported options during activation inside the app.

cancel.q: Can I cancel or change plans anytime?
cancel.a: Yes. You can manage or cancel your subscription from the billing page in the app. Changes take effect at the end of your current billing period.

family.a: Family packs create a shared data pool across multiple Chatforia accounts. One person pays the bill, and you can invite or remove members and set limits per person.

randomChat.title: Ingxoxo Engahleliwe
randomChat.subtitle: Hlangana nomuntu omusha ngokushesha, noma ukhethe ukuxoxa noRia.
randomChat.description: Qala ukuxoxa ungaziwa kuqala. Engeza umngane kamuva uma uzizwa ukhululekile.
randomChat.setAge: Beka ibanga lakho lobudala ku-Profile → Iminyaka & Ingxoxo Engahleliwe ukuze uhlangane nabantu.
randomChat.hiddenUsernames: Amagama abasebenzisi ahlala efihlakele kuze bobabili bakhethe ukwengeza umngane.
randomChat.riaSeparate: Xoxa noRia noma yinini — ngokwehlukana nokuhlanganiswa kwabantu abangahleliwe.
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: Sigcina kuphela ibanga lobudala (hhayi usuku lwakho lokuzalwa ngqo). Lokhu kusetshenziselwa ukugcina ukuphathwa kwamaqembu e-Random Chat kufanelekile. Ukuze uhlangane nabantu (hhayi i-RiaBot kuphela), setha ibanga lakho lobudala ku-Settings → Age & Random Chat.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Setha ibanga lakho lobudala ku-Profile → Age & Random Chat ukuze uhlangane nabantu.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: Ukuze uhlangane nabantu (hhayi i-RiaBot kuphela), setha ibanga lakho lobudala ku-Settings → Age & Random Chat.

login.title: Qhubeka uye ku-Chatforia
login.ssoUnavailable: Ukufaka okukodwa okwamanje akwenzeki. Sebenzisa igama lomsebenzisi nephasiwedi esikhundleni salokho.

verification.sent: I-imeyili yokuqinisekisa ithunyelwe. Bheka i-inbox yakho.

error.unprocessable: Isicelo esingalungile. Hlola igama lakho lomsebenzisi/i-imeyili nephasiwedi.
error.deviceLimit: Umkhawulo wedivayisi usufinyelelwe ku-Free plan. Phuma kwenye idivayisi noma uthuthukise uye ku-Premium ukuze uxhumanise amadivayisi amaningi.

forgotPassword.title: Khohlile i-password
forgotPassword.helper: Faka i-imeyili oyisebenzisile ukudala i-akhawunti yakho ye-Chatforia futhi sizokuthumelela isixhumanisi esiphephile sokubuyekeza i-password yakho.
forgotPassword.genericError: Akwenzeki ukucubungula isicelo. Sicela uzame futhi ngemva komzuzwana.
forgotPassword.sentHelper: Uma ikhona i-akhawunti ngaleyo imeyili, sithumele isixhumanisi sokuvuselela iphasiwedi. Kungathatha imizuzu embalwa ukuze ifike. Qiniseka ukuthi uhlole ifolda yakho ye-spam noma yezokuphromotha.

resetPassword.title: Sethoba Iphasiwedi
resetPassword.missingToken: Ithokheni yokusetha kabusha iphasiwedi ayilungile noma ayikho.
resetPassword.missingTokenHelper: Ithokheni ayilungile noma ayikho. Sicela ucele isixhumanisi esisha sokubuyisela iphasiwedi.
resetPassword.strongPasswordHint: Choose a strong password you don’t use elsewhere.

support.heading: How can we help?
support.contactIntro: We’ll try to resolve this instantly. If not, our team will follow up.
support.sent: Message sent. We’ll reply by email.
support.sendError: Could not send. Email support@chatforia.com instead.
support.actionFailed: Could not complete that action. Please try again.
support.ticketCreated: We couldn’t resolve this automatically. Our team will follow up.
support.escalationMessage: We couldn’t resolve this automatically. Our team will follow up.
support.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
support.resolvedInstantly: Issue resolved instantly — no ticket needed.

account.q: How do I create or recover my account?
account.a: Landa uhlelo lokusebenza noma usebenzise iwebhu, thinta "Dala i-akhawunti", qinisekisa i-imeyili/inombolo yakho yocingo. Ukuze ubuyise, sebenzisa "Ngikhohliwe iphasiwedi".

privacy.a: Yebo. Imilayezo nezingcingo zifihlwe ngokuphelele (end-to-end) ngokungagcini. Ungu wedwa nomamukeli ongakwazi ukuzifunda.

translate.a: Vumela "Auto-translate" ku-Settings → Appearance & Language. Sihumusha kudivayisi lapho sekuxhaswa khona, kungenjalo sisebenzisa ama-API avikelekile ane-metadata encane.

contact.a: Sithinte ku-support@chatforia.com. Faka izithombe-skrini kanye nohlelo lwakho lokusebenza inguqulo.

gettingStarted.title: Ukuqala
gettingStarted.subtitle: Usanda kuqala ku-Chatforia? Leli qalo elisheshayo likhombisa izinto eziyisisekelo ukuze ukwazi ukusebenza ngempumelelo ngemizuzu.

alert.text: Lomhlahlandlela uzokhula njengoba sithumela izici ezintsha. Uma kukhona okushodayo, sazise nge-

section1.title: 1) Dala i-akhawunti yakho
section1.prefsStart: Ku-app, vula Izilungiselelo ukuze usethe izintandokazi zakho

section2.title: 2) Qala ukuthumela imilayezo
section2.item1: Dala i-DM noma Iqembu bese uthumela umlayezo wakho wokuqala.
section2.item2: Use instant translation to chat across 100+ languages.
section2.item3: Zama imilayezo ephunyayo nezitifiketi zokufunda ku-Profile → Ubumfihlo.

section3.title: 3) Hamba phambili
section3.item1: Ungakwazi ukuthuthukisa uhlelo lokukhokha noma yinini ngaphakathi kohlelo lokusebenza.
section3.item2: Uma usungene, ungaxhuma eminye imishini futhi usethe ukugcinwa kwedatha okufihliwe kusuka ku-Settings kuhlelo lokusebenza.
section3.item2Part1: Uma usungene, ungaxhuma eminye imishini futhi usethe ukugcinwa kwedatha okufihliwe kusuka ku-Settings kuhlelo lokusebenza.

howItWorks.title: How Chatforia Works
howItWorks.intro: Chatforia is designed to make communication simple, fast, and accessible. Getting started takes just a few steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up using your email or username to create your Chatforia account.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Connect with others by selecting contacts or starting new chats.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Messages are delivered quickly to provide a smooth communication experience.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Built-in translation helps users communicate across different languages.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Manage your preferences, contacts, and communication settings.

safety.title: Ukuvikeleka & Izinkomba Zomphakathi
safety.intro: I-Chatforia izibophezele ekugcineni indawo ephephile nenhlonipho kubo bonke abasebenzisi. Lezi zinkomba zisiza ukuqinisekisa isipiliyoni esihle kubo bonke.
safety.respectDesc: Kulindeleke ukuthi abasebenzisi baxhumane ngokuhlonipha. Ukuhlukunyezwa, ukuxhashazwa, noma ukuziphatha okubucayi akukuvunyelwe.

tools.block: Block users to prevent further interaction

safety.enforcementDesc: We may take action against accounts that violate these guidelines, including warnings, restrictions, or permanent removal from the platform.

whyMessaging.title: Why Messaging Platforms Matter More Than Ever
whyMessaging.intro: Messaging platforms have become one of the most important tools for communication in today’s world. From personal conversations to business interactions, messaging apps allow people to stay connected instantly and efficiently.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: People rely on messaging apps for daily communication with friends, family, and colleagues. Whether it's a quick update or a long conversation, messaging provides a convenient and flexible way to stay in touch.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: One of the main advantages of messaging platforms is their speed. Messages are delivered instantly, allowing users to communicate in real time. This level of convenience has made messaging the preferred method of communication for many people.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Messaging platforms connect people across the globe. With internet access, users can communicate regardless of location, making it easier to build relationships and collaborate internationally.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Modern messaging platforms focus on giving users control over their data and conversations. Features like encryption, privacy settings, and message controls allow users to communicate with confidence.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Messaging continues to evolve with new features such as AI-powered responses, translation, and multimedia sharing. As technology advances, messaging platforms will become even more powerful and versatile.
whyMessaging.outro: Chatforia is built with these principles in mind, offering a fast, secure, and user-friendly messaging experience for a connected world.

global.title: The Future of Global Communication
global.intro: Communication has evolved rapidly over the past few decades. What once required phone calls or in-person meetings can now be done quickly through messaging platforms. As technology continues to advance, global communication is becoming faster, more accessible, and more inclusive.
global.barriersDesc: One of the biggest changes in communication is the reduction of geographic barriers. People can now connect with others across the world in near real time. Whether for personal conversations, business, or collaboration, messaging platforms have made distance far less limiting.
global.translationDesc: Language has traditionally been one of the biggest obstacles to global communication. Today, built-in translation tools help bridge that gap. Platforms like Chatforia allow users to communicate more easily even if they speak different languages, creating new opportunities for connection and understanding.
global.realtimeDesc: Speed is a key factor shaping modern communication. Users expect messages to be delivered quickly, and modern infrastructure supports that expectation. Real-time messaging enables more natural and fluid conversations.
global.privacyDesc: As communication becomes more digital, privacy and security are increasingly important. Users want confidence that their conversations are protected. Features like encryption and user-controlled settings help support a more secure communication experience.
global.futureDesc: The future of global communication will likely include more advanced tools, such as AI-assisted messaging, improved translation, and enhanced user experiences. As technology evolves, communication will continue to become more intuitive and accessible.
global.outro: Platforms like Chatforia are part of this shift, helping people connect more easily across languages and borders.

index.title: Chatforia Blog
index.intro: Explore insights on communication, online safety, and how messaging technology is connecting people around the world.

chatSafely.title: How to Chat Safely Online
chatSafely.intro: Online communication has made it easier than ever to connect with people across the world. Whether you're messaging friends, meeting new people, or collaborating professionally, messaging platforms play a major role in everyday life. However, staying safe online is just as important as staying connected.

personalInfo.title: Protect Your Personal Information
personalInfo.body: One of the most important rules of online safety is to avoid sharing sensitive personal information. This includes your home address, financial details, passwords, or any identifying information that could be misused. Even in casual conversations, it's best to be mindful of what you share and who you share it with.

safetyFeatures.title: Use Built-In Safety Features
safetyFeatures.body: Modern messaging platforms like Chatforia provide tools to help users stay safe. Features such as blocking, reporting, and privacy controls are designed to give users control over their experience. If someone behaves inappropriately or makes you uncomfortable, you should use these tools immediately.

scams.title: Be Aware of Scams
scams.body: Scammers often use messaging platforms to trick users into sharing personal information or sending money. Be cautious of messages that seem too good to be true, such as unexpected offers, urgent requests, or unfamiliar links. Always verify the identity of the person you're communicating with before taking any action.

responsibly.title: Communicate Responsibly
responsibly.body: Respectful communication helps create a safer environment for everyone. Avoid engaging in harmful or abusive conversations, and be mindful of how your words may affect others. Positive interactions contribute to a better experience for all users.

whySafety.title: Why Online Safety Matters
whySafety.body: As digital communication continues to grow, maintaining safety and trust becomes increasingly important. By following basic safety practices and using available tools, users can enjoy the benefits of messaging while minimizing risks.

chatSafely.conclusion: Staying safe online doesn’t require advanced technical knowledge—just awareness, caution, and good judgment. With the right habits, you can communicate confidently and securely.

about.title: Mayelana ne-Chatforia
about.description: I-Chatforia iyinhlelo yokuthumela imiyalezo ephephile, esekelwe ezilimini eziningi, enokufihlwa kwedatha kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni (E2E), ukuhumusha ngokushesha, kanye nokubiza ngomsindo/ividiyo. Injongo yethu ilula: ukusiza abantu baxhumane—ngokuphepha, ngasese, nangaphezu kwezilimi.

values.privacy: Ukuqinisekisa ubumfihlo kuqala: Ukuvalwa kwedatha kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni (E2E) ngokujwayelekile.
values.access: Ukufinyelela kubo bonke: Ukuguqulela ngokuzenzakalelayo izilimi ezingaphezu kuka-100.
values.control: Ukulawula: Imilayezo ephunyayo kanye nezitifiketi zokufundwa kuyinketho.
values.access_aria: Ukufinyelela kubo bonke: Ukushintshisa ngokuzenzakalela izilimi ezingaphezu kuka-100.
values.control_aria: Ukulawula: Imilayezo ephunyayo nezitifiketi zokufunda azimanyalali.

about.howDescription:
Imilayezo ibethwa kudivayisi yakho ngaphambi kokuba iphume kuyo.
Ukuguqulela, ukugcinwa kwedatha, nokuvumelanisa amadivayisi kuhlelwe ukunciphisa lokho amaseva ethu angakubona.
about.privacyDesc: Ukubethela kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni nezilawuli zobumfihlo zakhelwe ngaphakathi ku-Chatforia kusukela ekuqaleni.
about.accessDesc: I-Chatforia isiza abantu baxhumane ngaphezu kwezilimi, amadivayisi, nemingcele.
about.controlDesc: Khetha ukuthi imilayezo ibukeka kanjani, nini lapho inyamalala khona, nokuthi i-akhawunti yakho ihlala ivikelekile kanjani.

press.title: Press
press.boilerplateBody: I-Chatforia uhlelo lokuthumela imilayezo oluqala ngobumfihlo olwenza ingxoxo phakathi kwezilimi zibe lula. Imilayezo ivikelwe kusukela ekuqaleni iye ekugcineni futhi i-app inesixhaso sokuhumusha esakhelwe ngaphakathi esisekela izilimi ezingaphezu kuka-100 ngesikhathi sangempela. Abasebenzisi bangavumela imilayezo inyamalale, bagcine ukuthola ubufakazi bokufunda kuyinketho, futhi bahlanganise imilayezo kumadivayisi ahlukene. Iyatholakala ku-iOS, Android, naku-webhu.
press.scanTip: Kwi-desktop? Skena ngocingo lwakho ukuze uthole uhlelo lokusebenza.

careers.title: Imisebenzi
careers.intro: Siyithimba elincane elisungulayo elakha i-Chatforia — umlayezo wangasese womhlaba wonke oqala kuwebhu, ku-iOS, naku-Android. Uma ukhathalela ubumfihlo, ukufihlwa kwemininingwane, kanye nezipiliyoni zabasebenzisi ezimnandi, singathanda ukuzwa kuwe.
careers.openRoles: Izindima zokungena ekusunguleni: Umholi we-Full-stack Engineer, i-Backend Engineer (Node.js), Umkhandi we-Frontend/Web (React), Umkhandi we-Mobile (iOS), Umkhandi we-Mobile (Android), Umkhandi we-DevOps/SRE, Umkhandi Wezokuphepha Nokufihla Idatha, Umkhandi Wezokuxhumana (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Ungafaka kanjani isicelo: Sebenzisa inkinobho engezansi ukuthumela i-imeyili eneresume yakho nezixhumanisi.
careers.whyBullets:
• Siza ukwakha isisekelo somlayezo womhlaba wonke omusha.
• Thumela izithuthukisi ezisetshenziswa kuwebhu, ku-iOS, naku-Android.
• Sebenza ngqo nomseki ekwakhiweni nasekuqondiseni umkhiqizo.
• Bamba izindawo ezinethonya elikhulu ku-stack: imilayezo, izwi, ividiyo, ukufihla imininingwane, ezokuxhumana, i-AI. n• Joyina ekuqaleni — ngaphambi kokuba isisekelo sabasebenzisi sikhule.

advertise.title: Khangisa ne-Chatforia
advertise.description: Finyelela kubasebenzisi abathumela imilayezo abazibophezele ngokubeka okunomoya, okuphephile kumkhiqizo. Sinikeza isitoreji sebhanela ezindaweni ezibonakala kakhulu, izixhaso, futhi izipesheli zangaphakathi. Ababhalisile be-Premium ababoni izikhangiso.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Siphinde sinikeze isitoko nge-Google AdSense. Ungaqondisa i-Chatforia nge-ID yomshicileli {{pubId}}, noma usebenzise ifomu elingezansi ukuthola izixhaso ngqo.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Siphinde sinikeze ezinye izitoko nge-Google AdSense. Izixhaso ngqo ziyatholakala—sebenzisa ifomu elingezansi.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Sisondela ekupheleni kwesitoko sethu sezikhangiso. Sitshele ngomkhankaso wakho futhi sizoncoma izindawo zokubeka.

why.highSession: Inani eliphezulu lezikhathi zokuxoxa nesikhathi eside sokuhlala ku-UI yokuxoxa
why.brandSafe: Izinhlobo eziphephile kubhrendi; ukulinganiselwa kwesibalo sezikhathi ngokuhlonipha
why.sponsoredMoments: Izikhathi ezixhaswayo (isb., i-modal ethi "Qala Ingxoxo") etholakala
why.deals: Direct deals or programmatic via AdSense/Google Ads

form.submittedMsg: Ngiyabonga! Isicelo sakho sesithunyelwe. Sizobuya kuye ngokushesha.
form.mailtoInfo: Uvula uhlelo lwakho lwe-imeyili ukuthumela isicelo…

contact.title: Xhumana Nathi
contact.errorSend: Akwenzekanga ukuthumela. Sicela uthumele i-imeyili ku-support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: This Privacy Policy explains how Chatforia (“we”, “us”) collects, uses, and shares information when you use our apps and services. We design Chatforia to minimize the data we can access.

infoWeCollect.title: Information we collect
infoWeCollect.account: Account info (e.g., email/phone) to create and secure your account.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Okuqukethwe okuvikelwe (imiyalezo/izingcingo) kuvikelwe kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni; asikwazi ukukufunda.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Ukuxilongwa/ukusetshenziswa njengemibhalo yokwehluleka, uhlobo lwedivayisi, noma ukuhlaziywa okujwayelekile ukuze kuthuthukiswe ukusebenza.

sms.title: Amanombolo weselula ne-SMS
sms.body:
Uma ukhetha ukuhlinzeka inombolo yocingo ephathekayo, siyisebenzisa ukuvumela izici ezifana nokuqinisekisa i-akhawunti, izaziso zokungena, nokuthumela imilayezo kusuka kumsebenzisi kuya kumsebenzisi nge-SMS lapho sekuxhaswa khona. Singathumela imilayezo ye-SMS yokuthengiselana ehlobene ne-akhawunti yakho nemisebenzi yakho ku-Chatforia. Ungakhetha ukungatholi imilayezo ye-SMS nganoma yisiphi isikhathi ngokuphendula ngokugama elisekelwayo lokuphuma (njenge-"STOP") noma ngokushintsha izintandokazi zakho zezaziso kuhlelo lokusebenza. Asikwazi
thengisa inombolo yakho yocingo noma ukuyisebenzisa ekumaketheni okungahlangene.

howWeUse.title: How we use information
howWeUse.provide: Provide and secure the service (auth, spam/abuse detection).

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.body: We don’t sell personal data. We may share limited data with processors (e.g., push notifications, analytics) under strict contracts.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Depending on your region (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), you may request access, correction, deletion, or opt-out of certain processing. Contact: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Data retention & security
retention.body: We retain only what’s needed to operate the service and apply industry-standard security. E2E content can’t be decrypted by us.

children.title: Izingane
children.body: I-Chatforia ayihloselwe izingane ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-13 (noma njengoba kudingeka ngumthetho wendawo yakho).

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We’ll post updates here and revise the “Last updated” date.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: Ngokusebenzisa i-Chatforia uyavuma le Mithetho. Uma ungavumelani, ungayisebenzisi insiza.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Hlinzeka ngolwazi oluqondile futhi ugcine imininingwane yokungena iphephile.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Akukho okuqukethwe okungekho emthethweni, okudlulele, noma okuphulayo; akukho spam noma ukusetshenziswa ngokuzenzakalelayo.

sms.title: SMS communications
sms.body: If you provide a mobile phone number, you agree that Chatforia may send you SMS messages related to your account and use of the service, such as login alerts, security notifications, and messages related to conversations you initiate or participate in. We do not use SMS for promotional or marketing messages without your explicit consent. Standard message and data rates may apply. You can opt out of SMS messages at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (for example, “STOP”) or by updating your notification settings in the app.

yourContent.title: Your content
yourContent.body: You retain rights to your content. You grant us necessary rights to operate the service (e.g., routing, storage, translation).

disclaimer.title: Disclaimers & liability
disclaimer.body: Service is provided “as is” without warranties. To the fullest extent permitted by law, Chatforia isn’t liable for indirect or consequential damages.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We may update these terms; continued use after changes means acceptance.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.intro: At Chatforia, we strive to provide a high-quality service to all users. This Refund Policy outlines when refunds may be issued.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.body: Subscriptions are billed in advance on a recurring basis. You may cancel at any time through your account settings or the platform used to purchase.

eligibility.title: Refund Eligibility
eligibility.body: Refunds may be granted for duplicate charges, billing errors, or technical issues preventing access to paid features. All requests are reviewed case-by-case.

nonRefundable.title: Non-Refundable
nonRefundable.body: We generally do not provide refunds for unused time, partial subscription periods, or failure to cancel before renewal.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Purchases
thirdParty.body: If purchased through third-party platforms such as the Apple App Store, refunds must be requested directly through those platforms.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
doNotSell.body: Chatforia does not sell personal information. California residents can still submit requests under CPRA using the button below.

cookies.title: Cookie Settings
cookies.body: Chatforia uses minimal cookies (e.g., session, security). We don’t use third-party ads cookies. Manage cookies via your browser’s settings.

whatWeSend.title: What we send
whatWeSend.body: Chatforia sends only account-related and conversational SMS to phone numbers a user has explicitly provided and consented to. Typical messages include login/verification codes, message delivery alerts, security notices, and transactional account updates.

optIn.title: How users opt in
optIn.body: Users opt in by entering their phone number during registration and checking the SMS consent checkbox on the registration page or the dedicated

optOut.title: How users opt out
optOut.stop: Reply STOP to any Chatforia SMS to opt out.

help.title: Help
help.bodyPrefix: Reply HELP for assistance or email

privacyTerms.title: Privacy & Terms
privacyTerms.bodyStart: By consenting to SMS, users also agree to our
